inputs.vague: A customer wants to cancel their SuperFrog appearance request. The system confirms the request and the customer agrees to the cancellation policy, leading the system to officially cancel the request, process any necessary refund, and notify relevant parties.
inputs.detailed:
Primary Actor:
Customer
Secondary Actors:
Payment System, Spirit Director, SuperFrog Student
Trigger:
The Customer indicates to cancel a submitted SuperFrog appearance request.
Description:
The Customer wants to cancel a request so that she can inform the TCU Spirit Team that she no longer wants a SuperFrog appearance.
Preconditions:
PRE-1. A request of the Customer has been submitted to the System and is in either “Pending” or “Approved” or “Assigned” status.
Postconditions:
POST-1. The request is updated in the System with a status of “Canceled by the customer”.
Main Success Scenario:
The Customer indicates to cancel a submitted SuperFrog appearance request. The Customer provides the unique identifier of the request to the System.
The System retrieves the specified request and displays it to the Customer.
The Customer views the details of the request and chooses to cancel the request.
The System displays the cancellation policy and asks the Customer to confirm the cancellation. (See BR-13)
The Customer reads and agrees with the cancellation policy.
The Customer confirms the cancellation.
The System marks the request as “Canceled by the customer”.
The System has the Payment System process refund.
The System notifies relevant actors about the cancellation according to the “Notification” defined in the Associated Information of this use case.
Use case ends.
Extensions:
7a. Canceling an approved request which has already been signed up by a SuperFrog Student:
7a1. The System marks the request as “Canceled by the customer”.
7a2. The System cancels the SuperFrog sign-up related to this request and returns to step 8 of the normal flow.
8a. The Customer has not made a payment yet:
8a1. Returns to step 9 of the normal flow.
8b. The cancellation is within 24 hours of the event date and time:
8b1. Returns to step 9 of the normal flow.

groundTruth.name: Cancel SuperFrog Appearance Request
groundTruth.summary: Customer cancels a submitted SuperFrog appearance request.
preconditions: A request of the Customer has been submitted to the System and is in either “Pending” or “Approved” or “Assigned” status.

steps.description: Indicates to cancel a submitted SuperFrog appearance request.
Provides the unique identifier of the request to the System.
Retrieves the specified request and displays it to the Customer.
Views the details of the request and chooses to cancel the request.
Displays the cancellation policy and asks the Customer to confirm the cancellation.
Reads and agrees with the cancellation policy.
Marks the request as “Canceled by the customer”.
Has the Payment System process refund.
Notifies relevant actors about the cancellation.
Marks the request as “Canceled by the customer”.
Cancels the SuperFrog sign-up related to this request.
The customer has not made a payment yet.
The cancellation is within 24 hours of the event date and time.
